message:
✨ Add backend proxy for Nightly E2E GitHub Actions data (#946)

Frontend was calling GitHub API directly using a user's localStorage
token, which isn't available on deployed instances (vllm-d, pokprodsa).

- Add /api/nightly-e2e/runs backend endpoint that proxies GitHub Actions API
- Uses server-side GITHUB_TOKEN env var for authentication
- 5-minute in-memory cache to avoid rate limiting
- Fetches all 16 workflows in parallel with goroutines
- Handles 404 gracefully for workflows not yet created (BM, CKS)
- Frontend hook now calls backend first, falls back to demo data

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -577,6 +577,10 @@ func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
 	api.Get("/benchmarks/reports", benchmarkHandlers.GetReports)
 	api.Get("/benchmarks/reports/stream", benchmarkHandlers.StreamReports)
 
+	// Nightly E2E status (GitHub Actions proxy with server-side token + cache)
+	nightlyE2E := handlers.NewNightlyE2EHandler(s.config.GitHubToken)
+	api.Get("/nightly-e2e/runs", nightlyE2E.GetRuns)
+
 	// GPU reservation routes
 	gpuHandler := handlers.NewGPUHandler(s.store)
 	api.Post("/gpu/reservations", gpuHandler.CreateReservation)
